ops.body: Revised plan drafted at ~/.cc-pool/accounts/acct-08/plans/prancy-newt-revised.md — delta revision: synckit importable (new synckit/meshtrust extraction phase), ccd v0.9.0 trust hooks replace the pair-first remote posture, tailscale-cert deferred to an iOS-only question, mesh phase shrinks to rpc-over-ssh + presence routing. Awaiting yasyf review.
